title: panicum divaricatissimum var. ammophilum
intro: Panicum divaricatissimum var. ammophilum, also known as beach panic grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Beach panic grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
